tasks.description: Scaffold Next.js project with TypeScript using create-next-app - targets: package.json, tsconfig.json, next.config.ts
tasks.acceptance: npm run dev starts, TypeScript compiles

tasks.description: Configure Tailwind CSS with custom theme, import globals.css - targets: tailwind.config.ts, app/globals.css
tasks.acceptance: Tailwind classes render correctly

tasks.description: Set up app directory with root layout and default home page - targets: app/layout.tsx, app/page.tsx
tasks.acceptance: npm run dev renders a page

tasks.description: Define TypeScript types for all F1 data entities - targets: lib/types.ts
tasks.acceptance: 28 types exported, tsc compiles

tasks.description: Create OpenF1 API client with rate limiting and typed endpoints - targets: lib/api/openf1.ts
tasks.acceptance: 21 endpoint functions, rate limiter, tsc compiles

tasks.description: Install Firebase SDK, set up config with env vars - targets: lib/firebase.ts, .env.local
tasks.acceptance: Firebase initializes from env vars

tasks.description: Build Firebase Auth context provider with useAuth hook - targets: lib/auth/AuthContext.tsx, lib/auth/useAuth.ts
tasks.acceptance: Auth context provides login/signup/logout

tasks.description: Implement ProtectedRoute wrapper - targets: components/ProtectedRoute.tsx
tasks.acceptance: Redirects unauthenticated users to login

tasks.description: Configure Vercel deployment config and env template - targets: .env.local.example, vercel.json
tasks.acceptance: Build passes, env template created

tasks.description: Rebrand app layout, metadata, landing page, and favicon from F1 Tracker to SectorOne - targets: app/layout.tsx, app/page.tsx, app/favicon.ico
tasks.acceptance: App displays SectorOne branding throughout

tasks.description: Install Space Grotesk and Inter fonts via next/font/google, update theme config - targets: app/layout.tsx, app/globals.css
tasks.acceptance: Fonts load correctly, design tokens available

tasks.description: Build sidebar navigation with Archive, Strategy Lab, Fantasy, Settings sections - targets: components/SideNav.tsx, components/MobileNav.tsx
tasks.acceptance: Sidebar on desktop, bottom nav on mobile with active highlighting

tasks.description: Create reusable glassmorphic card, button, chip, and input components - targets: components/ui/Card.tsx, components/ui/Button.tsx, components/ui/Chip.tsx, components/ui/Input.tsx
tasks.acceptance: Components render with SectorOne design tokens

tasks.description: Build Archive grid page with GP cards showing circuit outlines, podium, and session info - targets: app/archive/page.tsx, components/GpCard.tsx
tasks.acceptance: Archive displays GP cards from OpenF1 sessions data

tasks.description: Add filters for circuit type and weather to the Archive page - targets: components/ArchiveFilters.tsx
tasks.acceptance: User can filter sessions by circuit type and weather

tasks.description: Build session detail page with replay launch and session info - targets: app/archive/[sessionKey]/page.tsx
tasks.acceptance: Session detail shows event info and launches replay

tasks.description: Build Canvas track map with circuit rendering, driver dots, active sector highlighting - targets: components/TrackMap.tsx
tasks.acceptance: Track renders from circuit coordinate data

tasks.description: Build race data service and frame buffer for sequential replay frames - targets: lib/raceData.ts, lib/frameBuffer.ts
tasks.acceptance: Race data loads and frames accessible by index

tasks.description: Build replay playback engine and bottom timeline controls with event markers - targets: hooks/useReplayEngine.ts, components/TimelineControls.tsx
tasks.acceptance: Replay plays, pauses, seeks with timeline markers

tasks.description: Build scrollable leaderboard with position, driver, team, gap, tyre life, stints - targets: components/Leaderboard.tsx
tasks.acceptance: Leaderboard shows all drivers with tyre and interval data

tasks.description: Build floating driver telemetry HUD: speed, gear, RPM bar, DRS, throttle, brake - targets: components/TelemetryHUD.tsx
tasks.acceptance: Telemetry updates per frame for selected driver

tasks.description: Build gap-to-leader chart and tyre degradation heatmap side panels - targets: components/GapChart.tsx, components/TyreWidget.tsx
tasks.acceptance: Charts render with per-driver data during replay

tasks.description: Build weather radar visualization with precipitation radar and stats - targets: components/WeatherRadar.tsx
tasks.acceptance: Weather radar displays conditions and rain risk

tasks.description: Build strategic pit window predictor widget - targets: components/PitWindowWidget.tsx
tasks.acceptance: Pit window shows optimal lap range and undercut delta

tasks.description: Build driver and constructor standings page with points, wins, podiums, and team color bars - targets: app/standings/page.tsx, components/StandingsTable.tsx
tasks.acceptance: Standings display drivers and constructors with full stats

tasks.description: Build form chart bars (last 5 races) for each driver in standings - targets: components/FormChart.tsx
tasks.acceptance: Form bars show recent race performance with F1 Red highlighting

tasks.description: Build points progression chart with multi-driver heartbeat lines - targets: components/PointsChart.tsx
tasks.acceptance: Points chart shows season trends for selected drivers

tasks.description: Build leading constructor card with driver point split bars - targets: components/ConstructorCard.tsx
tasks.acceptance: Constructor card shows team points with VER/PER split

tasks.description: Build fantasy team dashboard: team name, total points, budget bar, points history chart - targets: app/fantasy/page.tsx, components/FantasyDashboard.tsx
tasks.acceptance: Dashboard shows team stats and points chart

tasks.description: Build fantasy points scoring system based on race results - targets: lib/fantasy/scoring.ts
tasks.acceptance: Points calculated from session results and stints data

tasks.description: Build roster editor with driver browsing, budget tracking, and save/revert - targets: components/RosterEditor.tsx, components/DriverCard.tsx
tasks.acceptance: User can build a 5+1 roster within $100M budget

tasks.description: Build league system: create, join, and view league leaderboards with rank trends - targets: app/fantasy/leagues/page.tsx, components/LeagueLeaderboard.tsx
tasks.acceptance: Users can create and view leagues with standings

tasks.description: Implement Firestore persistence for fantasy teams and league data - targets: lib/fantasy/firestore.ts
tasks.acceptance: Fantasy data persists across sessions for authenticated users

tasks.description: Implement responsive layouts for all pages: Archive, Strategy Lab, Standings, Fantasy - targets: all relevant page.tsx files
tasks.acceptance: All features usable on 375px mobile viewport

tasks.description: Add loading skeletons, error boundaries, and graceful error handling - targets: components/ErrorBoundary.tsx, components/LoadingSkeleton.tsx
tasks.acceptance: API failures show user-friendly error UI

tasks.description: Add touch replay controls for mobile: tap, swipe, pinch gestures - targets: hooks/useTouchControls.ts
tasks.acceptance: Replay controllable via touch on mobile

tasks.description: Performance optimization: lazy load panels, memoize canvas, code-split routes - targets: app/*/page.tsx, next.config.ts
tasks.acceptance: Lighthouse performance score >= 80 on mobile

tasks.description: Final deployment verification, env var audit, and README - targets: README.md, vercel.json
tasks.acceptance: Deployment succeeds end-to-end
